_comment: Default power configuration for NVIDIA H100 SXM5 systems with NVLink / InfiniBand Fat-Tree fabric.

_references.nvswitch: NVSwitch 3.0 (Hopper): 900 W / 144 NVLink 4.0 ports → 6.25 W/port  (NVIDIA Hot Chips 34, 2022)
_references.tor: Arista 7050CX3-32S (32×100GbE QSFP28): 230 W / 64 ports → 3.59 W/port  (7050CX3-32S DS, 2021)
_references.nic: NVIDIA ConnectX-7 400G NDR (MCX755106AS-HEAT): ~35 W / 4 lanes → 8.8 W/port  (ConnectX-7 DS, 2022)
_references.per_npu: Intra-node GPU ring/chain: estimated from NVLink 4.0 lane power budget (~1-2 W/port)

_comment_switch_power: Provide P_max_W + P_idle_W + N_ports per switch type.  from_json() calls switch_port_power_from_datasheet() at load time to derive active/idle/sleep W/port.  Override omega_sport (default 0.1) with {type}_omega_sport if needed.  Types without datasheet entries use direct *_active/idle/sleep_power fallback.
_note_per_npu: Estimated from NVLink 4.0 short-reach lane power budget — no public datasheet
_comment_prefixes: host_prefix identifies compute nodes.  switch_type_prefixes maps each switch-type name to its nodemap name prefix.  Extend or override for any topology (Jellyfish, Dragonfly, custom).
_comment_degrees: Ports per switch come from the {type}_N_ports keys above (same value used by the datasheet converter).  The power model falls back to topology-connectivity degree for any type whose N_ports is absent.
